channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'RichTok' Influencer Documents Week of Luxury Gifts from Husband for 'Valentine's Advent Calendar' Series
item.description: Leonora Smee previously went viral during the 2025 holiday season, when her husband Mark gave her a gift every day leading up to Christmas

item.title: Amelia Dimoldenberg Set to Star in a Rom-Com That Seemingly Parallels Her Viral 'Chicken Shop Date' Show
item.description: The ‘Chicken Shop Date’ internet personality is known for her flirtatious interviews with A-listers

item.title: Arden Cho Says She's on the Hunt for the 'Perfect' Wedding Dress Ahead of Italy Nuptials (Exclusive)
item.description: The 'KPop Demon Hunters' star got engaged on March 31, 2025

item.title: James Van Der Beek's Widow Kimberly and Their 6 Kids Are 'Out of Funds' After His Death, 'Facing Uncertain Future'
item.description: The 'Dawson's Creek' alum died on Wednesday, Feb. 11 due to complications from stage 3 colorectal cancer

item.title: Kelsea Ballerini Comments on Post About 'Crossing Lines' and 'Wandering Eyes' After Chase Stokes Split
item.description: Ballerini commented on fellow country singer Ashley Cooke's Instagram post, in which she teased a new breakup song

item.title: Bud Cort, 'Harold and Maude' Actor, Dead at 77
item.description: Actor Bud Cort, who starred in movies and TV for decades, has died. Cort had many credits, beginning in television and movies in the late 1960s, and w...

item.title: TMZ Sports Streaming Live From Newsroom, Join The Conversation!
item.description: TMZ Sports is going live from the newsroom to discuss the day's biggest stories ... but we don't just want folks to watch and enjoy the conversation, ...

item.title: K-Pop News: TWICE's Dahyun Halts Tour Performances Due To Injury
item.description: TWICE’s Dahyun has temporarily halted tour performances because of an ankle fracture ... sparking social media buzz and upsetting fans. Last night, th...

item.title: David Archuleta Scouted Locations For Suicide Before Faith Intervened
item.description: David Archuleta is opening up about the darkest chapter of his life ... revealing he was actively scouting locations to end his life before his faith ...

item.title: Victoria Justice’s Thailand Bikini Pics Do Her Justice
item.description: American actress and singer Victoria Justice is the latest celeb to flee L.A. and vacay her winter away ... The 32-year-old sported a striped bikini a...
